title: BVEST 2020 - Word War 2020
subtitle: An engaging debate-based event that encouraged participants to think critically and propose solutions to real-world challenges. Focused on the Sustainable Development Goals, it provided a platform for meaningful discussions and idea exchange.
description:
Title of the event: Word War 
 Objective: The objective of this event was to bring together ideas and solutions to real-world problems. It helped create an environment where young changemakers could come together and discuss how to solve problems in the form of a debate. In this event a 1vs1 debate competition was held where the topics were chosen from the Sustainable Development Agenda for 2030. The competition was held through online video conferencing. The event gave us insight about how we can meet our goals of sustainable development. Both pros and cons of the Sustainable Development Agenda for 2030 were discussed.
location: Bharati Vidyapeeth's College of Engineering, New Delhi
highlights: Enhanced critical thinking and problem-solving skills
